tweet.text: RT @WhistleSports: AD IS NOT FROM THIS PLANET 🤯 https://t.co/AYVbo4Y2mF

I’m excited to announce MOE DIAMONDS INC has partnered up with me. We’re hosting a charitable raffle for @Ad99Solutions. The winner will receive a custom diamond cuban chain I gifted myself after my Super Bowl LVI victory.
Find details to enter here: https://t.co/aGASkKv8QJ https://t.co/h4G5dZEb94
